groups.name: common.context
groups.description: Configuration for the request context auto-configuration.

groups.name: common.logging
groups.description: Configuration for the request/response logging filter.

groups.name: common.object-mapper
groups.description: Configuration for the Jackson ObjectMapper auto-configuration.

groups.name: snowflake
groups.description: Configuration for the Snowflake distributed ID generator.

properties.name: common.context.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the ContextAutoConfiguration that registers the ContextFilter for automatic request context setup. Disabling this means X-Request-ID header parsing and RequestContext population will not happen automatically.

properties.name: common.logging.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the RequestLoggingAutoConfiguration entirely. Set to false to prevent the RequestLoggingFilter from being registered, regardless of other logging settings.

properties.name: common.logging.request
properties.description: Whether to log the JSON request body. Only effective for requests with Content-Type application/json. Request bodies are capped at 8192 bytes.

properties.name: common.logging.response
properties.description: Whether to log the JSON response body. Only effective for responses with Content-Type application/json.

properties.name: common.logging.header
properties.description: Whether to log the incoming request headers. Headers listed under mask-headers will have their values replaced with ******.

properties.name: common.logging.exclude-paths
properties.description: URL path patterns to exclude from logging. Supports Ant-style wildcards (e.g. /api/health/**, /actuator/**).

properties.name: common.logging.mask-headers
properties.description: Case-insensitive list of request header names whose values are replaced with ****** in the log output.

properties.name: common.logging.mask-fields
properties.description: JSON field names whose values are replaced with ****** in the logged request and response bodies.

properties.name: common.object-mapper.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the ObjectMapperAutoConfiguration. When disabled, no ObjectMapper bean is created by this library. Useful when you want to provide your own fully custom ObjectMapper.

properties.name: common.object-mapper.serialize-long-as-string
properties.description: Whether to serialize Long, long primitive, and BigInteger values as JSON strings instead of JSON numbers. Recommended for APIs consumed by JavaScript clients that cannot safely represent 64-bit integers.

properties.name: snowflake.machine-id
properties.description: Unique machine identifier used for Snowflake ID generation. Must be unique across all running instances in a distributed deployment. Valid range: 0 to 1023.
